transcript: Speaker A: I hate English. Speaker B: What's your name? Speaker A: My name is Anna. Speaker B: How are you? Speaker A: I am good, thank you. Speaker B: Can you speak English? Speaker A: Yes, I can't. Speaker B: How old are you? Speaker A: 20 and 6. Speaker B: Say, 'I am 26 years old'. Speaker A: I am 26 years old. How can I practice more English? Speaker B: Just download Loora, and we can practice together everyday. Speaker A: Nice! I'll download Loora right now!
